+class AdaptiveThresholdSketch:

+    """Adaptive threshold sketch - looks more like hand drawings."""

+    def __init__(self, p=0.15):

+        self.p = p

+    

+    def __call__(self, img):

+        if random.random() < self.p:

+            img_np = np.array(img)

+            gray = cv2.cvtColor(img_np, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)

+            # Adaptive threshold

+            block_size = random.choice([7, 11, 15, 21])

+            C = random.randint(2, 10)

+            sketch = cv2.adaptiveThreshold(gray, 255, cv2.ADAPTIVE_THRESH_GAUSSIAN_C,

+                                           cv2.THRESH_BINARY, block_size, C)

+            img = Image.fromarray(np.stack([sketch]*3, axis=-1))

+        return img

+

-

             return ImageOps.invert(img)

         return img

+class MorphologicalSketch:

+    """Use morphological operations to create sketch-like images."""

+    def __init__(self, p=0.1):

+        self.p = p

+    def __call__(self, img):

+        if random.random() < self.p:

+            img_np = np.array(img)

+            gray = cv2.cvtColor(img_np, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)

+            # Morphological gradient = dilation - erosion = edge-like

+            kernel = cv2.getStructuringElement(cv2.MORPH_ELLIPSE, (3, 3))

+            gradient = cv2.morphologyEx(gray, cv2.MORPH_GRADIENT, kernel)

+            # Threshold

+            _, sketch = cv2.threshold(gradient, 0, 255, cv2.THRESH_BINARY + cv2.THRESH_OTSU)

+            # Invert so strokes are black on white

+            sketch = 255 - sketch

+            img = Image.fromarray(np.stack([sketch]*3, axis=-1))

+        return img

+

+def get_train_transform(sketch_heavy=False):

+    if sketch_heavy:

+        # Very aggressive sketch augmentation for domain bridging

+        return T.Compose([

+            T.RandomResizedCrop(224, scale=(0.3, 1.0)),

+            T.RandomHorizontalFlip(),

+            # High probability of sketch-like transforms

+            SketchAugment(p=0.40),

+            XDoGSketch(p=0.15),

+            AdaptiveThresholdSketch(p=0.15),

+            MorphologicalSketch(p=0.10),

+            StrongGrayscale(p=0.60),

+            StyleRandomization(p=0.10),

+            T.ColorJitter(brightness=0.4, contrast=0.5, saturation=0.4, hue=0.1),

+            RandomInvert(p=0.05),

+            T.RandomApply([T.GaussianBlur(kernel_size=5, sigma=(0.1, 2.0))], p=0.15),

+            T.ToTensor(),

+            T.Normalize(mean=[0.485, 0.456, 0.406], std=[0.229, 0.224, 0.225]),

+            T.RandomErasing(p=0.15),

+        ])

+    else:

+        return T.Compose([

+            T.RandomResizedCrop(224, scale=(0.4, 1.0)),

+            T.RandomHorizontalFlip(),

+            SketchAugment(p=0.35),

+            XDoGSketch(p=0.15),

+            AdaptiveThresholdSketch(p=0.10),

+            StrongGrayscale(p=0.50),

+            StyleRandomization(p=0.15),

+            T.ColorJitter(brightness=0.4, contrast=0.4, saturation=0.4, hue=0.1),

+            RandomInvert(p=0.05),

+            T.RandomApply([T.GaussianBlur(kernel_size=5, sigma=(0.1, 2.0))], p=0.2),

+            T.ToTensor(),

+            T.Normalize(mean=[0.485, 0.456, 0.406], std=[0.229, 0.224, 0.225]),

+            T.RandomErasing(p=0.15),

+        ])

 

 def get_val_transform():

     return T.Compose([

@@ -19,3 +26,29 @@
     

     def get_features(self, x):

+class DINOv2Model(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, num_classes=345, drop_rate=0.0):

+        super().__init__()

+        from transformers import AutoModel

+        self.backbone = AutoModel.from_pretrained('facebook/dinov2-base')

+        feat_dim = 768  # DINOv2-base

+        

+        if drop_rate > 0:

+            self.classifier = nn.Sequential(

+                nn.Dropout(drop_rate),

+                nn.Linear(feat_dim, num_classes)

+            )

+        else:

+            self.classifier = nn.Linear(feat_dim, num_classes)

+    

+    def forward(self, x):

+        outputs = self.backbone(x)

+        # Use CLS token

+        features = outputs.last_hidden_state[:, 0]

+        return self.classifier(features)

+    

+    def get_features(self, x):

+        outputs = self.backbone(x)

+        return outputs.last_hidden_state[:, 0]

+def load_model(ckpt_path, device='cuda'):

+    ckpt = torch.load(ckpt_path, map_location='cpu')

+    model_type = ckpt.get('model_type', 'clip')

+    

+    if model_type == 'dinov2':

+        from model import DINOv2Model

+        model = DINOv2Model(num_classes=345, drop_rate=ckpt.get('drop_rate', 0.0))

+    else:

+        from model import DomainNetModel

+        backbone = ckpt.get('backbone', 'vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai')

+        model = DomainNetModel(num_classes=345, backbone=backbone, drop_rate=ckpt.get('drop_rate', 0.0))

+    

+    model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model_state_dict'])

+    model = model.to(device)

+    model.eval()

+    return model

+# Train DINOv2 model
